_note: Apostles brought in through kinship. James the Greater & John the Evangelist were sons of Zebedee & Salome; in tradition Salome was a sister (or close kinswoman) of the Virgin Mary (cf. Mk 15:40 with Mt 27:56 and Jn 19:25), making James & John Jesus's cousins. Salome appended to Heli & Anne's union as Mary's sister. (James the Less, Jude/Thaddaeus and Simon are ALREADY in the tree as the 'brethren' via Clopas=Alphaeus.) Peter, Andrew, Philip, Bartholomew, Thomas, Matthew and Judas Iscariot have no genealogical link to this tree and are not added. Sorts after 07g; Heli & Anne exist.

Salome (Mary Salome)
sister of the Virgin Mary · tradition (cf. Mk 15:40, Jn 19:25)

James the Greater
c.5 BC · Apostle; son of Zebedee; Jesus's cousin · Matthew 4:21

John the Evangelist
c.6 AD · Apostle 'whom Jesus loved'; son of Zebedee · John 21
